title: Gods, Demons and Symbols of Ancient Mesopotamia: An Illustrated Dictionary

description.en: Jeremy Black and Anthony Green's 1992 British Museum Press reference — the standard illustrated dictionary of Mesopotamian iconography, including the chaos-dragon (Tiamat, mušḫuššu) and wisdom-serpent (Ningishzida) figures the corpus uses to distinguish the chaos-serpent and wisdom-serpent clusters.
